why.title: Why people switch nei Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives do a real telefoannûmer, smart oersetting, en a clear path nei go ad-free wannear you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter advertinsjes op Fergees, a simple Plus opwurdearje wannear you’re ready, en Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, en built-in oersetting instead fan old-school oprop trochstjoere.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs petear apps
messengers.body: Text real telefoannûmers — net just other app gebrûkrs — mei AI en status built in. Great as you’re coming fan apps like TextFree of TextMe.

feature.ads: Fergees forever mei advertinsjes yn the app

why.disclaimer: Comparison based op publicly beskikber information en mei feroarje over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree of TextMe binne generally similar nei TextNow.

free.a: Yes. The Fergees plan omfettet a Chatforia-nûmer, calling, en messaging mei ads. Do kin stay op Fergees as long as do like, of opwurdearje nei fuortsmite advertinsjes en unlock mear features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus en Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes advertinsjes en extends dyn berjochtskiednis — perfect foar everyday gebrûk. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools foar rewrites en replies, en priority stipe foar swier gebrûkrs.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile gebrûks wrâldwiid eSIM coverage. Availability depends op dyn lân en device. You’ll see supported options during activation binnen the app.

cancel.q: Kin ik op elk momint annulearje of fan plan feroarje?
cancel.a: Yes. Do kin beheare of annulearje dyn abonnemint fan the fakturearring page yn the app. Changes take effect at the end fan dyn hjoeddeistich fakturearring period.

family.a: Famylje packs create a dielde datapool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, en do kin útnoegje of fuortsmite leden en set limits per person.

privacy.a: Yes. Berjochten en oproppen binne ein-oan-ein fersifere troch default. Only do en the recipient kin read them.

howItWorks.title: Hoe Chatforia wurket
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed nei make communication simple, fluch, en accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.

safety.title: Feiligens- en mienskipsrjochtlinen
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed nei maintaining a feilich en respectful environment foar alle gebrûkrs. Dizze guidelines help ensure a positive experience foar elkenien.
safety.respectDesc: Brûkrs binne expected nei communicate respectfully. Harassment, abgebrûk, of harmful behavior is net permitted.

tools.block: Block gebrûkrs nei prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: Wy mei take action nochrisst accounts dat violate dizze guidelines, ynklusyf warnings, restrictions, of permanent removal fan the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms hawwe become one fan the most important tools foar communication yn today’s world. From personal conversations nei business interactions, messaging apps tastean people nei stay connected instantly en efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely op messaging apps foar daily communication mei friends, famylje, en colleagues. Whether it's a quick update of a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient en flexible way nei stay yn touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One fan the main advantages fan messaging platforms is their speed. Berjochten binne delivered instantly, allowing gebrûkrs nei communicate yn real time. Dit level fan convenience hat made messaging the preferred method fan communication foar many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, gebrûkrs kin communicate regardminder fan location, making it easier nei build relationships en collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus op giving gebrûkrs control over their data en conversations. Funksjes like fersifering, privacyynstellingen, en berjocht controls tastean gebrûkrs nei communicate mei confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues nei evolve mei nij funksjes such as AI-oandreaune responses, oersetting, en multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms sil become even mear powerful en versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built mei dizze principles yn mind, offering a fluch, feilich, en gebrûkr-friendly messaging experience foar a connected world.

global.title: The Future fan Wrâldwiid Communication
global.intro: Communication hat evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once fereaske telefoan oproppen of in-person meetings kin no wêze done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues nei advance, wrâldwide kommunikaasje is becoming flucher, mear accessible, en mear inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One fan the biggest changes yn communication is the reduction fan geographic barriers. People kin no connect mei others across the world yn near real time. Whether foar personal conversations, business, of collaboration, messaging platforms hawwe made distance far minder limiting.
global.translationDesc: Taal hat traditionally west one fan the biggest obstacles nei wrâldwide kommunikaasje. Hjoed, built-in oersetting tools help bridge dat gap. Platforms like Chatforia tastean gebrûkrs nei communicate mear easily even as sy speak different languages, creating nij opportunities foar connection en understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a kaai factor shaping modern communication. Brûkrs expect berjochten nei wêze delivered quickly, en modern infrastructure supports dat expectation. Real-time messaging enables mear natural en fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes mear digital, privacy en feiligens binne increasingly important. Brûkrs want confidence dat their conversations binne protected. Funksjes like fersifering en gebrûkr-controlled ynstellingen help stipe a mear feilich communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future fan wrâldwide kommunikaasje sil likely include mear avansearre tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved oersetting, en enhanced gebrûkr experiences. As technology evolves, communication sil continue nei become mear intuitive en accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia binne part fan dit shift, helping people connect mear easily across languages en borders.

index.title: Chatforia-blog
index.intro: Explore insights op communication, online safety, en hoe messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is a feilich, multilingual messenger mei ein-oan-ein fersifering, direkt oersetting, en voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: help people connect—safely, privately, en across languages.

values.access_aria: Access foar alle: Automatysk oersette 100+ languages.

about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-earst messaging app dat makes cross-language petear effortminder. Berjochten binne ein-oan-ein fersifere troch standert, en built-in oersetting supports 100+ languages yn real time. Brûkrs kin ynskeakelje ferdwynende berjochten, keep lêsbefêstigingen opsjoneel, en sync across devices. Beskikber op iOS, Android, en the web.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a privee, wrâldwiid messenger launching op web, iOS, en Android. If do care about privacy, fersifering, en delightful gebrûkr experiences, we’d love nei hear fan you.
careers.openRoles: Iepenje founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Feiligens & Fersifering Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).

careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation fan a nij wrâldwiid messenger.
• Ship improvements gebrûkd across web, iOS, en Android.
• Work directly mei the founder op architecture en product direction.
• Own high-impact areas fan the stack: messaging, voice, fideo, fersifering, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the gebrûkr base scales.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

refund.title: Werombetellingsbelied
refund.intro: At Chatforia, wy strive nei provide a high-quality service nei alle gebrûkrs. Dit Werombetellingsbelied outlines wannear refunds mei wêze issued.

subscriptions.title: Abonneminten
subscriptions.body: Abonneminten binne billed yn advance op a recurring basis. Do mei annulearje at any time through dyn accountynstellingen of the platform gebrûkd nei purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds mei wêze granted foar duplicate charges, fakturearring errors, of technical issues preventing access nei betelle features. Alle requests binne reviewed case-by-case.

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated
